page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5-c28g1.7xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance belonging to the ecs.gn5 family. It is equipped with 28 dedicated Intel Xeon E5-2682 v4 physical cores operating at 2.5 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The hardware configuration includes 112.0 GB of system memory, providing 4.0 GB per core, alongside a single NVIDIA P100 GPU with 16 GB of VRAM. Local storage is provided via a 472 GB SSD, and the network interface delivers a baseline bandwidth of 5 Gbps.

Benchmark data reveals a clear performance divergence between single-core CPU tasks and GPU-accelerated operations. Single-core CPU performance is limited, with stress-ng single-core benchmarks placing in the bottom 10% and single-threaded compression tests scoring in the bottom 25%. However, multi-core CPU performance and memory bandwidth remain in the middle 50% tier. In contrast, the instance excels in GPU-driven tasks, achieving top-tier performance in LLM inference prompt processing and text generation for medium 7B models, as well as prompt processing for small 135M models.

Utilizing legacy Intel Broadwell CPUs and NVIDIA Pascal GPU architecture, this instance offers a qualitative cost-efficiency profile suited for workloads that require GPU acceleration without the premium of current-generation hardware. It is appropriate for small to medium LLM inference, multi-threaded data processing, and database operations that can leverage the local SSD storage and dedicated core allocation, provided the application is not bound by single-core CPU performance.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5-c28g1.7xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance featuring 28 dedicated Intel Xeon E5-2682 v4 physical cores running at 2.5 GHz, 112.0 GB of RAM, and a 472 GB local SSD. Acceleration is driven by a single NVIDIA P100 GPU with 16 GB of VRAM. Benchmark results show a significant contrast in performance: single-core CPU execution is weak, ranking in the bottom 10% for stress-ng, whereas GPU-accelerated tasks like LLM inference for 7B models reach top-tier speeds. Multi-core performance, memory bandwidth, and database operations reside in the average tier. This hardware profile makes the instance a qualitatively cost-effective option for legacy GPU workloads, multi-threaded processing, and small-to-medium model inference where single-thread CPU performance is not the primary bottleneck.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5-c28g1.7xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server with 28 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 112 GB RAM, a 472 GB SSD, and an NVIDIA P100 GPU, delivering top-tier performance for medium-model LLM inference.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5-c28g1.7xlarge features 28 Intel cores, 112 GB RAM, a 472 GB SSD, and an NVIDIA P100 GPU for accelerated parallel workloads.
tagline: A GPU-accelerated instance combining dedicated multi-core processing, local SSD storage, and dedicated hardware acceleration for parallel computing workloads.
bullet_points: Equipped with 28 dedicated Intel Xeon E5-2682 v4 physical cores and 112 GB RAM
Features one NVIDIA P100 GPU with 16 GB VRAM for hardware acceleration
Includes 472 GB of local SSD storage and 5 Gbps baseline network bandwidth
Delivers top-tier benchmark performance for small and medium LLM inference
Exhibits lower single-core CPU performance, making it less suitable for single-threaded tasks
Suited for multi-threaded processing, database operations, and legacy GPU workloads
